dict.string: $(DEVELOPMENT_LANGUAGE)
ICE Gate
$(EXECUTABLE_NAME)
$(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER)
ice_gate
APPL
$(FLUTTER_BUILD_NAME)
Editor
$(FLUTTER_BUILD_NUMBER)
We need music library access to let you select background sounds for the focus timer
We need Bluetooth to connect to external GPS devices and health trackers.
We need Bluetooth to connect to external GPS devices and health trackers.
We need camera access to let you take photos of your food for calorie tracking
We need access to your contacts to let you import friends into your social circle.
We use Face ID to allow you to securely log into your account.
We need access to your health data to track your daily steps and metrics.
We would like to write health data to help you track your progress.
We need your location to track your running distance and movement quests in the real world both when the app is in use and in the background.
We need your location to track your running distance and movement quests in the real world in the background.
We need your location to track your running distance and movement quests in the real world.
We need to track your steps for the ice_gate dashboard.
We need photo library access to let you select files and media for calorie tracking and background sounds
LaunchScreen
Main
UPLINK requires access to the local network to connect to SSH servers and AI gateways.
